assertion_results.text: Each non-documentation, non-testing task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Documentation tasks (tasks whose filename or description indicates doc-only scope) and testing tasks (tasks whose filename or description indicates cross-cutting testing scope) are exempt from requiring Files to Modify, Files to Create, and Implementation Notes — they must still include Repository, Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: Non-doc/non-testing tasks (1-5) all contain Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify/Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements. Task 1: Files to Create (advisory_summary.rs), Files to Modify (mod.rs, sbom.rs), Implementation Notes present. Task 2: Files to Create (advisory_summary.rs), Files to Modify (mod.rs), Implementation Notes present. Task 3: Files to Modify (mod.rs), Implementation Notes present. Task 4: Files to Modify (advisory_summary.rs, sbom.rs), Implementation Notes present. Task 5: Files to Create (sbom_advisory_summary.rs), Files to Modify (Cargo.toml), Implementation Notes present. Doc task (6) and testing tasks (7, 8) include Repository, Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements and correctly omit Files to Modify, Files to Create, and Implementation Notes.

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 12 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: 8 task files exist: task-1-advisory-severity-model-and-service.md through task-8-performance-benchmarks.md. 8 is between 3 and 12 inclusive.
All 8 tasks have '## Repository' section with value 'trustify-backend': task-1 line 2, task-2 line 2, task-3 line 2, task-4 line 2, task-5 line 2, task-6 line 2, task-7 line 2, task-8 line 2.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency graph: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Task 2. Task 4 depends on Task 2. Task 5 depends on Tasks 1, 2, 3, 4. Task 6 depends on Tasks 1, 2, 3, 4, 5. Task 7 depends on Tasks 1, 2, 3, 4, 5. Task 8 depends on Tasks 1, 2, 3, 4, 5. All edges point from lower to higher numbered tasks, forming a valid DAG with no cycles.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (exists in manifest) and modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (exists), creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs (new file in existing model/ directory). Task 2 creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (existing endpoints/ dir), modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (exists). Task 3 modifies modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (exists). Task 4 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (created by task 2) and modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (exists). Task 5 creates tests/api/sbom_advisory_summary.rs (existing tests/api/ dir), modifies tests/Cargo.toml (exists). Tasks 6, 7, 8 have no Files to Modify/Create sections (exempt as doc/testing tasks).

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: Impact map Changes section lists 7 bullet points, all with concrete details: 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct with fields critical, high, medium, low, total', 'Add severity aggregation query method to SbomService that joins sbom_advisory with advisory entities, deduplicates by advisory ID, and counts by severity level', 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint handler with 5-minute cache via tower-http caching middleware', 'Return 404 when the SBOM ID does not exist', 'Add optional ?threshold=critical query parameter', 'Add cache invalidation logic to the advisory ingestion pipeline', 'Add integration tests...covering: valid SBOM, nonexistent SBOM (404), deduplication, threshold filtering, and caching behavior'. All changes reference specific structs, endpoints, field names, and behaviors.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 8 tasks contain '## Repository' followed by a single line 'trustify-backend'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 8 tasks (task-1 through task-8) contain ## Target Branch (set to 'main'), ## Description, ## Acceptance Criteria (with checkbox items), and ## Test Requirements (with checkbox items) sections.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Modified files all exist in repo-backend.md manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (line 46), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (line 49), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (line 83), tests/Cargo.toml (line 114). Created files are new files in directories that exist in the manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ (line 40-43), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/ (line 48-51), tests/api/ (line 110-113). No invented or non-existent directories used.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every non-documentation, non-testing task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance. Documentation tasks and testing tasks are exempt from this requirement as they intentionally omit Implementation Notes
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs (SbomSummary), modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs, entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, common/src/db/query.rs, CONVENTIONS.md. Task 2 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs. Task 3 references: modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs, modules/ingestor/src/graph/sbom/mod.rs. Task 4 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/list.rs for query parameter pattern. Task 5 references: tests/api/sbom.rs, tests/api/advisory.rs, assert_eq!(resp.status(), StatusCode::OK) pattern. Tasks 6, 7, 8 correctly omit Implementation Notes.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence: All 8 tasks contain '## Target Branch' followed by 'main': task-1 line 5, task-2 line 5, task-3 line 5, task-4 line 5, task-5 line 5, task-6 line 5, task-7 line 5, task-8 line 5.

assertion_results.text: For each task created, a description digest is produced — evidenced by a separate digest file (e.g., task-N-digest.md), a digest entry in the impact map, or a '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<64-char-hex>' marker in any output file. The digest must contain a format-tagged SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:' or 'sha256-adf:', not a placeholder, abbreviated value, or example string
assertion_results.evidence: All 8 digest files exist with valid sha256-md hashes (64 lowercase hex chars): task-1-digest.md: sha256-md:c23d399afccd4c47a8c8ae00318891b43089f1f28210ff1a54cd32bb4a1941b3, task-2-digest.md: sha256-md:a56ac2db3801a188b2b8d05c4252fdd7f5f8fbb8bd357ce3fd5615fddf95126f, task-3-digest.md: sha256-md:40dc65c2ab354ddbd3cdfb41b73e76f8126ad29de7637506ddb4217c8a893f9c, task-4-digest.md: sha256-md:a3243d813f423da58eb38e4f38145b444d3ad0e1b3f6ae365acdaa69648e5bbc, task-5-digest.md: sha256-md:b21b451cbcff441d0b0e279d97bb762595ef377e4e7cbd3eb55250490172d017, task-6-digest.md: sha256-md:9cd138c5cdb5dbb6dc85444c15b2f7340130c64a50a1f0120c9e6894d615b3b6, task-7-digest.md: sha256-md:ee2c114e3c9c9787bd05a5288d13b3786cfa2ed96c4c507b2cf77077b13b90a4, task-8-digest.md: sha256-md:fb5543f5bb881cdbdcde3e81ef656a7fbbeb432c1300c8c6eb9ec4c5323de95d. All use the '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<64-hex>' format.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: All convention rationales in Implementation Notes follow the prescribed format. Task 1: 'Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs matching the convention's Rust source file scope.' and 'Applies: task creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs matching the convention's module structure scope.' Task 2: 'Applies: task creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs matching the convention's Rust source file scope.', 'Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs matching the convention's endpoint registration scope.', 'Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs matching the convention's endpoint configuration scope.' Task 3: 'Applies: task modifies modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs matching the convention's Rust source file scope.' Task 4: 'Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs matching the convention's Rust source file scope.' Task 5: 'Applies: task creates tests/api/sbm_advisory_summary.rs matching the convention's integration test scope.' No conventions are listed with 'Not applicable' annotations.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a priority set (not 'Undefined'), the plan documents that the Feature's priority is inherited by created tasks — evidenced by priority field values in the impact map, task creation log, or task description files. When the Feature's priority is 'Undefined', the plan documents that priority inheritance is skipped (not propagated as null or 'Undefined')
assertion_results.evidence: Impact map line 4: 'Priority: Major (inherited from Feature)'. Impact map line 55: 'Priority: "Major" inherited from Feature TC-9001 (not "Undefined", so propagated)'. additional_fields JSON includes '"priority": {"name": "Major"}'. Summary-comment.md states: 'Feature priority: Major', 'Propagated to tasks: Yes — all created tasks and epics include "priority": {"name": "Major"} in additional_fields', 'Rationale: Feature priority is "Major" (not "Undefined"), so it is propagated per Step 1 and Step 6a rules'.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a non-empty fixVersions array and the fixVersion scope config (from ### Jira Field Defaults in CLAUDE.md) is 'task' or 'both' (or absent, defaulting to 'both'), the plan documents that fixVersions are inherited by created tasks — evidenced by fixVersion values in the impact map, task creation log, or task description files. When fixVersion scope is 'feature' or the Feature has no fixVersions, the plan documents that fixVersion inheritance is skipped
assertion_results.evidence: Impact map line 5: 'Fix Versions: RHTPA 1.5.0 (inherited from Feature)'. Impact map line 56: 'fixVersions: "RHTPA 1.5.0" inherited from Feature TC-9001. No fixVersion scope setting found in Jira Field Defaults — defaulting to "both" (propagate to tasks).' additional_fields JSON includes '"fixVersions": [{"name": "RHTPA 1.5.0"}]'. Summary-comment.md states: 'Feature fixVersions: RHTPA 1.5.0', 'Propagated to tasks: Yes', 'Rationale: Feature has a non-empty fixVersions array, and no fixVersion scope setting exists in Jira Field Defaults — defaulting to "both" (propagate to tasks)'.

assertion_results.text: A summary of inherited field propagation is produced — evidenced by a summary-comment.md file in the outputs directory, or a summary section in the impact map that includes the inherited priority and fixVersion values propagated to tasks, or states they were omitted and why
assertion_results.evidence: summary-comment.md exists in outputs directory. Contains '## Inherited Field Values' section with subsections for Priority ('Feature priority: Major', 'Propagated to tasks: Yes'), Fix Versions ('Feature fixVersions: RHTPA 1.5.0', 'Propagated to tasks: Yes'), and Labels. Also includes complete additional_fields JSON block showing all inherited values.

assertion_results.text: A documentation task is generated because the feature description's Documentation Considerations section indicates doc impact (Updates — add endpoint to REST API reference). The documentation task includes Repository, Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements, and Dependencies sections, and omits Files to Modify, Files to Create, API Changes, Implementation Notes, Reuse Candidates, and Verification Commands
assertion_results.evidence: task-6-documentation.md exists. Present sections: Repository ('trustify-backend'), Target Branch ('main'), Description (mentions 'Updates to existing content' and adding endpoint to REST API reference), Acceptance Criteria (4 items), Test Requirements (3 items), Dependencies (depends on Tasks 1-5). Omitted sections confirmed absent: no '## Files to Modify', no '## Files to Create', no '## API Changes', no '## Implementation Notes', no '## Reuse Candidates', no '## Verification Commands'.

assertion_results.text: Testing tasks are generated from the testing readiness template — exactly 2 testing tasks are created (one per test category: Smoke Tests and Performance Benchmarks). Each testing task includes Repository, Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements, and Dependencies sections, and omits Files to Modify, Files to Create, API Changes, Implementation Notes, Reuse Candidates, and Verification Commands
assertion_results.evidence: Exactly 2 testing tasks: task-7-smoke-tests.md (Smoke Tests) and task-8-performance-benchmarks.md (Performance Benchmarks). Task 7 includes: Repository ('trustify-backend'), Target Branch ('main'), Description, Acceptance Criteria (3 items), Test Requirements (5 items), Dependencies (Tasks 1-5). Omitted sections confirmed absent. Task 8 includes: Repository ('trustify-backend'), Target Branch ('main'), Description, Acceptance Criteria (3 items), Test Requirements (5 items), Dependencies (Tasks 1-5). Omitted sections confirmed absent. No other testing readiness tasks exist.

assertion_results.text: Each testing task depends on all implementation tasks (not on documentation or other testing tasks)
assertion_results.evidence: Implementation tasks are Tasks 1-5. Task 7 (Smoke Tests) Dependencies: 'Depends on: Task 1', 'Depends on: Task 2', 'Depends on: Task 3', 'Depends on: Task 4', 'Depends on: Task 5'. Task 8 (Performance Benchmarks) Dependencies: 'Depends on: Task 1', 'Depends on: Task 2', 'Depends on: Task 3', 'Depends on: Task 4', 'Depends on: Task 5'. Neither testing task depends on Task 6 (documentation) or on each other.
